prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

Entry keywords: VIRAL PROTEIN/IMMUNE SYSTEM SUDV, neutralizing mAbs, VIRAL PROTEIN-IMMUNE SYSTEM complex. Polymer composition: protein/oligosaccharide.
